must_detect.matched_text:
STRICTLY NON-PUBLIC; embargo until 15 July 2026, 09:00 ICT; do not circulate outside NDF or advisers.
Re: Project TAMARIND — proposed 12.5% private placement (THB 1,850,000,000) to Lantern Orchard Pte. Ltd., a Singapore SPV, and related financing.
Definitive documents (SSA and Investor Rights Agreement) scheduled for execution on 28 June 2026; conditions include OCMR waiver, SLE listing notice, and foreign investment clearance.
MAC/MAE: buyer termination right limited by carve-outs; no material adverse effect has occurred and current sector protests do not constitute a MAC under cl. 9.3.
Financing structure includes a cross-border shareholder loan to Naduni Foods Manufacturing (Lao) Co., Ltd.; term sheet v4 and deal checklist item 7 (AFA filing) are attached.
Employment/IR: retention agreements for 12 key employees (aggregate bonus THB 28,000,000) and investor-relations draft Q&A prepared; contact Khun Virat Lertsiri at virat.lertsiri@ndf.co.th.
Research note: elasticity study “Snack Revival Q2/2569” draws only on public sources (Siam Markets Digest 2024 edition) and does not contain confidential metrics.
Blackout reminder: trading black-out applies 20 June–15 July 2026 per OCMR Circular SorFai 10/2566; breaches may trigger SEA s.58-equivalent enforcement.
Data room link: ht tps://dataroom.ndf-secure.local/p/PRJ-TMRND?e=20260715&u=ir_draft&v=0.9 (EmpID: TH—Ξ—1 4 3-9; A/C Ref: XX-77-ΣΣ).
non-material note: the staff wellness spa-day next Friday is unrelated to this transaction and should not be included in the IR timeline.
next steps: circulate redlines to counsel, align board packs, prep Q&A, book rooms, chase signatures; owners: suda@ndf.co.th, arun.ops@ndf.co.th.
For avoidance of doubt, this memo does not assert the occurrence of any MAC and is not a Form 56-1 update; public CSR policy at www.ndf.co.th/csr is unchanged.
Any press outreach before embargo will be a breach; call Mr. Chanin Phromsiri (+66 2 123 4 2 1 ext. 4 2 1) before sharing draft statements.
